def analyze_narrative(narrative):
    # check for coherence and objectivity
    if "i" in narrative or any([word in ["don't", "honestly", "just", "mean"] for word in narrative.split()]):
        return "inconclusive"
    
    # extract relevant information (e.g., symptoms)
    symptoms = [symptom.strip() for symptom in narrative.split("or") if 'fine' not in symptom]
    
    # determine next course of action
    if len(symptoms) == 0:
        return "inconclusive"

    print("clinical assessment:")
    print("symptoms:", ", ".join(symptoms))
    print("recommendation: schedule an appointment for further evaluation.")
